column1: # User-Provided Custom Phylonames
# Format: 3 tab-separated columns:
#   genus_species<TAB>custom_phyloname<TAB>unofficial_action
# Lines starting with # are comments.
# Each custom_phyloname follows GIGANTIC format:
#   Kingdom_Phylum_Class_Order_Family_Genus_species
# The third column controls UNOFFICIAL marking PER SPECIES:
#   ADD_UNOFFICIAL       - standard; clades that differ from NCBI get the
#                          UNOFFICIAL suffix. Use this for almost every row.
#   SUPPRESS_UNOFFICIAL  - use the phyloname as-is, no UNOFFICIAL marking
#                          for this specific row (power-user override).
# Note: setting `mark_unofficial: false` globally in
# START_HERE-user_config.yaml overrides every per-row choice and suppresses
# UNOFFICIAL marking across the whole project.
# Use this file to override NCBI-generated phylonames for species that:
#   - Have NOTINNCBI placeholders (not found in NCBI taxonomy)
#   - Have numbered clades (e.g., Kingdom6555) you want to name
#   - Have NCBI taxonomy you disagree with
# Copy this file to user_phylonames.tsv and edit with your overrides.
Monosiga_brevicollis_MX1
Salpingoeca_rosetta
